about.title: About Us
about.description1: We are a specialized store in presenting the finest gifts and occasions. We strive to provide a unique shopping experience that combines high quality with affordable prices for our valued customers.
about.description2: We offer a diverse range of distinctive gifts suitable for all occasions and holidays, ensuring customer satisfaction through excellent customer service and fast, safe delivery.
about.description3: Our mission is to help you find the perfect gift that expresses your feelings and brings joy to your loved ones on every occasion.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: At Gift Store, we value our customers' privacy and are committed to protecting their personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.collecting-desc: We collect the necessary information to process your orders and deliver products, including:
privacy.using-desc: We use your information only for:
privacy.using-item3: Sending order tracking notifications and special offers (with your consent)
privacy.protection-desc: We use the latest security technologies to protect your data from unauthorized access.
privacy.contact-desc: For any inquiries about the Privacy Policy, please contact us via email: privacy@giftshop.com

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.description: Welcome to Gift Store. By using our website and purchasing our products, you agree to the following terms and conditions:
terms.delivery-item1: All prices mentioned include tax unless otherwise stated
terms.delivery-item2: We offer delivery service to all regions within 2-5 business days
terms.delivery-item3: You can track your orders through the order tracking page
terms.quality-item1: We are committed to providing high-quality products that match the displayed images
terms.quality-item2: All products undergo thorough inspection before shipping
terms.quality-item3: We provide a warranty on all our products
terms.return-item1: You can return or exchange the product within 7 days of receipt
terms.return-item2: Products must be in their original condition and unused
terms.return-item3: Refund is processed within 3-5 business days
terms.inquiries-desc: For any inquiries about the Terms & Conditions, please contact us via email: support@giftshop.com

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are happy to communicate with you at any time. Our customer service team is ready to answer all your inquiries and help you choose the perfect gift.
contact.social-desc: Don't miss our latest offers and distinguished products by following us on social media platforms.
